THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: ON QUIETING TITLE. WILLIAM LEE, AS AN INDIVIDUAL AND TRUSTEE FOR RYAN LEE, LESLIE LEE, YEMAN WONG, ELAINE LEE, YVONNE LEE, EVELYN LEE, AARON LEE, BRANDON LEE, STEPHANIE WONG, GARRETT WONG, BRADFORD WONG, CLIFFORD FONG, AND ELISHA FENG, ARE THE SOLE OWNERS OF, AND LAWFULLY HOLD TITLE TO, THE REAL PROPERTY LOCATED AT 1624-1630 WASHINGTON STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, 94109. NO OTHER PERSONS OR ENTITIES POSSESS ANY LEGAL OR EQUITABLE CLAIM, RIGHT, TITLE, ESTATE, LIEN OR INTEREST IN 1624-1630 WASHINGTON STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, 94109, ADVERSE TO PLAINTIFFS' TITLE THERETO. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-28-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Quiet Title Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR#8098.

Michelle L. Scott, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff William Lee.
Witness Jackie Evelyn Lee sworn.
No other appearances.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court GRANTS Judgment Quieting Title as follows:
William Lee, as an individual and Trustee for Ryan Lee, Leslie Lee, Yeman Wong, Elaine Lee, Yvonne Lee, Evelyn Lee, Aaron Lee, Brandon Lee, Stephanie Wong, Garrett Wong, Bradford Wong, Clifford Fong, and Elisha Feng, are the sole owners of, and lawfully hold title to, the real property located at 1624-1630 Washington Street, San Francisco, California, 94109. No other persons or entities possess any legal or equitable claim, right, title, estate, lien or interest in 1624-1630 Washington Street, San Francisco, California, 94109, adverse to Plaintiffs' title thereto.
Order signed in open court.
